title: randpulse2~

arguments.description: non-0 sets to random gate value mode

flags.name: -mc <list>
flags.description: sets multichannel output with a list of frequencies

methods.description: non-0 sets to random gate value mode
a float sets seed, no float sets a unique internal
<channel, freq> set a single density channel

body: [randpulse2~] is a random pulse train oscillator. It alternates at random intervals according to a "density" parameter, which controls the average frequency.
